title: HUNBL-010 I only did it once just for fun, but the innocent girl who acted like my girlfriend was too annoying, so I shared it with my senior! I skewered her and turned her into a meat urinal with a deep throat blowjob!
description: She was kind of cute, so I tried it once just for fun, but she started acting like my girlfriend and it got really annoying. So I invited her over to my senior's house for a drink, and while I was pretending to be drunk and asleep, I had him do it! My senior was open to sex, and I was planning to hang up, so I gave him a deep throat fuck at the end, and he said something about being a masochist, so I guess everyone was happy about this lol
